step_rationale: Postmortem myocardial infarction marker; indicates severe cardiomyocyte damage.
mechanism: MARK4 is a microtubule-associated kinase released post-mortem and in severe cardiomyocyte injury during acute myocardial infarction.

references.title: MARK4 as a novel biomarker of acute myocardial ischemia-induced sudden cardiac death.
